attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID, SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY,SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER)+ MAX_VAL AS AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY,
SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY,
SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY ,
SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID AS EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,
SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID AS EP_BOM_REF_ID,
SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID AS EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
FROM  
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN ) SABBPL,
(
SELECT 
COALESCE(CASE WHEN SBOM.ITEM_TYPE = 'TURNKEY' THEN PRNT_PRDT_KEY.ITEM_KEY ELSE NSOL1.PRODUCT_KEY END  ,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(NIIT.ITEM_KEY ,-997)  AS CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
SBOM.BOM_REF_ID ,
SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,
COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
SBOM.ORG_CODE,
SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER,
SBOM.PO_NUMBER,
SBOM.ITEM_TYPE 
FROM 
(SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ORG_CODE,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,ITEM_TYPE,
POSITION('-' IN PO_NUMBER) AS LOC, CHARACTER_LENGTH(PO_NUMBER) AS TOT FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY
 UNION 
SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ORG_CODE,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,ITEM_TYPE,
POSITION('-' IN PO_NUMBER) AS LOC, CHARACTER_LENGTH(PO_NUMBER) AS TOT 
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY  ) SBOM
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  NCIO
               ON SBOM.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
               ON SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
               AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY   
INNER JOIN (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR'  AND bk_option_number_int=0
                AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) NSOL
                ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=CAST(SUBSTR (SBOM.PO_NUMBER,1,loc-1) AS BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SUBSTR (SBOM.PO_NUMBER,loc+1,tot)
                AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE	

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1 
 ON  	NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

/*NEW CHANGE FOR IMMDIATE PARENT PRODUCT_KEY  FOR THE TURNKEY TYPE*/

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_KEY  PRNT_PRDT_KEY 
ON 
PRNT_PRDT_KEY.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SBOM.PO_NUMBER
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID = SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID 
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID = COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1')
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_BOM_REF_ID = SBOM.BOM_REF_ID 
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.ITEM_NUMBER  = SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER  				

) SXMABBI
WHERE NOT EXISTS (      SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN  SAS
               WHERE SAS.PRODUCT_KEY  = SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY
               AND SAS.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY = SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
               AND SAS.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID = SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
               AND SAS.EP_BOM_REF_ID  = SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID
               AND SAS.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID  = SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
               AND SAS.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER)

SELECT SCXMPH.MESSAGE_3B2_ID,SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,SCXMPH.ASN_PROCESS_DATE,SCXMPH.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,SCXMPH.BOM_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1'),
SCXMPH.ITEM_NUMBER,SCXMPH.ITEM_REVISION,SCXMPH.ITEM_TYPE,SCXMPH.UOM,SCXMPH.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,SCXMPH.ORG_CODE,SCXMPH.FLB_COST,SCXMPH.DF_FEE_COST,SCXMPH.CURRENCY_CODE,SCXMPH.PLANNING_CODE,SCXMPH.REQUEST_ID,SCXMPH.CREATION_DATE,SCXMPH.CREATED_BY,SCXMPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SCXMPH.LAST_UPDATED_BY,SCXMPH.COST_UPDATED_FLAG,SCXMPH.GLOBAL_NAME,SCXMPH.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,SCXMPH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,SCXMPH.REFRESH_DATETIME, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
/* sdande:5/19/2014 Q4-JUNE release brazil tax elements starts*/
SCXMPH.CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT AS CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT ,
SCXMPH.ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT AS ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT ,
SCXMPH.RND_TAX_AMOUNT AS RND_TAX_AMOUNT,
SCXMPH.PIS_TAX_AMOUNT AS PIS_TAX_AMOUNT
/* sdande:5/19/2014 Q4-JUNE release brazil tax elements ends*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY SCXMPH
WHERE 
  NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO,      $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
WHERE   SCXMPH.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
AND  SCXMPH.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY)
                
OR NOT EXISTS  ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
WHERE  SCXMPH.ITEM_NUMBER = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
AND NP.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ( 'ATO MODEL', 'CONFIG SPARE','SPARE')
)
OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM  ( SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , MIN( PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
                                FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER 
                                WHERE SS_CD ='CG'      GROUP BY BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  ) NPO
              WHERE  SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER = NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  
              /*priyavij: Added as part of Q3FY16  BTS option class changes*/
               AND SCXMPH.ORG_CODE NOT IN ( SELECT INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG WHERE RU_BTS_ENABLED_FLG='Y') 
               /*End of code change*/
               )
			  
OR NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY  , MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR' 
                 AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) NSOL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
                WHERE  NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SUBSTR (SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,POSITION('-' IN SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER)+1,CHARACTER_LENGTH(SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER))
                AND NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=CAST(SUBSTR (SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,1,POSITION('-' IN SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER)-1) AS BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
				AND SCXMPH.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
				
)

SELECT  
NABBPL.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY AS AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY ,
SCXMPH.ASN_PROCESS_DATE AS ASN_PROCESS_DTM   ,            
CAST(SCXMPH.ASN_PROCESS_DATE AS DATE) DV_ASN_PROCESS_DT    ,         
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999)  AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
/*COALESCE(ST1.ITEM_KEY  ,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,*/

/*NEW CHANGE FOR IMMDIATE PARENT PRODUCT_KEY  FOR THE TURNKEY TYPE*/
COALESCE(CASE WHEN SCXMPH.ITEM_TYPE = 'TURNKEY' THEN PRNT_PRDT_KEY.ITEM_KEY ELSE NSOL1.PRODUCT_KEY END  ,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(NIIT.ITEM_KEY, -997) AS CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,              
SCXMPH.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID AS EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID  ,      
SCXMPH.BOM_REF_ID AS EP_BOM_REF_ID                 ,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') AS EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,   
COALESCE(SCXMPH.PLANNING_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS PLANNING_CD                  , 
COALESCE(SCXMPH.CREATION_DATE ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS CREATE_DTM                    ,
SCXMPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM            ,  
COALESCE(CAST(SCXMPH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) ,CURRENT_DATE) AS DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT            ,
SCXMPH.FLB_COST AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT ,
SCXMPH.DF_FEE_COST AS DF_FEE_USD_COST             ,  
COALESCE(SCXMPH.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,0.00) AS CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY          ,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN')  AS SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  ,
COALESCE(NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-99995) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY  ,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS AS_BUILT_PRODUCT_ITEM_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.ITEM_REVISION,'UNK') AS AS_BLT_CNSTNT_PART_ITEM_REV_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NABBPLPA.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END AS DML_TYPE,
/* sdande:5/19/2014 Q4-JUNE release brazil tax elements starts*/
COALESCE(SCXMPH.CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_BS_COFINS_TAX_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_BS_ICMS_NRCVRBL_TAX_USD_AMT ,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.RND_TAX_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_BS_RSRCH_DVLPMT_TAX_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCXMPH.PIS_TAX_AMOUNT,0) AS RU_BS_PIS_TAX_USD_AMT,
(CASE WHEN SCXMPH.CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL OR SCXMPH.ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL OR SCXMPH.RND_TAX_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL  
OR SCXMPH.PIS_TAX_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL  THEN  'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS BRAZIL_SPECIFIC_ROLE,
/* sdande:5/19/2014 Q4-JUNE release brazil tax elements ends*/
/* msaipras:03/30/2015 added this columns as part of Q3FY15 Apr QWN */
NASBBPL.COST_ROLLUP_DTM,
NASBBPL.DV_COST_ROLLUP_DT
/* msaipras:03/30/2015 release end of code change*/
FROM
(SELECT PO_NUMBER ,ASN_PROCESS_DATE ,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,BOM_REF_ID ,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1')  
BOM_PARENT_REF_ID ,ITEM_NUMBER ,ITEM_REVISION ,ITEM_TYPE,BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY ,ORG_CODE ,FLB_COST ,DF_FEE_COST ,
PLANNING_CODE ,CREATION_DATE ,CREATED_BY ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,LAST_UPDATED_BY ,COST_UPDATED_FLAG ,GLOBAL_NAME,
POSITION('-' IN PO_NUMBER) AS LOC, CHARACTER_LENGTH(PO_NUMBER) AS TOT,
CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT ,
ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT,
RND_TAX_AMOUNT,
PIS_TAX_AMOUNT
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY 
UNION 

SELECT PO_NUMBER ,ASN_PROCESS_DATE ,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,BOM_REF_ID, COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ITEM_NUMBER ,
ITEM_REVISION ,ITEM_TYPE,BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY ,ORG_CODE ,FLB_COST ,DF_FEE_COST ,PLANNING_CODE ,CREATION_DATE ,CREATED_BY ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,LAST_UPDATED_BY ,COST_UPDATED_FLAG ,GLOBAL_NAME,POSITION('-' IN PO_NUMBER) AS LOC, CHARACTER_LENGTH(PO_NUMBER) AS TOT,
CONFIS_TAX_AMOUNT ,
ICMS_TAX_AMOUNT,
RND_TAX_AMOUNT,
PIS_TAX_AMOUNT 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_MK_PO_HISTORY   )  
SCXMPH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  NCIO
ON SCXMPH.ORG_CODE =NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE   
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
                ON SCXMPH.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY 
				
INNER JOIN (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR'  AND bk_option_number_int=0
                AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) NSOL
                ON NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=CAST(SUBSTR (SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,1,loc-1)as BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SUBSTR (SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER,loc+1,tot)
                AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE	

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL1 
 ON  	NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
				
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , MIN( PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
                                FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER 
                                WHERE SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  ) NPO
                ON SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER = NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
 
/*NEW CHANGE FOR IMMDIATE PARENT PRODUCT_KEY  FOR THE TURNKEY TYPE*/

LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_KEY  PRNT_PRDT_KEY 
ON 
PRNT_PRDT_KEY.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID = SCXMPH.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID 
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID = COALESCE(SCXMPH.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1')
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.EP_BOM_REF_ID = SCXMPH.BOM_REF_ID 
AND PRNT_PRDT_KEY.ITEM_NUMBER  = SCXMPH.ITEM_NUMBER 

 
INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN NABBPL 
                ON  NABBPL.PRODUCT_KEY  = COALESCE(CASE WHEN SCXMPH.ITEM_TYPE = 'TURNKEY' THEN PRNT_PRDT_KEY.ITEM_KEY ELSE NSOL1.PRODUCT_KEY END,-997) 
                AND NABBPL.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY =COALESCE (NIIT.ITEM_KEY  ,-997) 
                AND NABBPL.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID    = SCXMPH.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
                AND NABBPL.EP_BOM_REF_ID  = SCXMPH.BOM_REF_ID
                AND NABBPL.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID  =COALESCE(SCXMPH.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1')  
                AND NABBPL.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SCXMPH.PO_NUMBER  

/* msaipras added this join as part of Q3FY15 Apr QWN */
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK NASBBPL
ON SCXMPH.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID=NASBBPL.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
AND SCXMPH.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID=NASBBPL.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
AND SCXMPH.BOM_REF_ID=NASBBPL.EP_BOM_REF_ID
AND NASBBPL.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY=COALESCE(NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-99995)
AND	NASBBPL.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY=COALESCE (NIIT.ITEM_KEY  ,-997)				
AND NASBBPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
                             
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_AS_BLT_BOM_PRDT_LNK_PST_ASN NABBPLPA
ON NABBPLPA.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY =NABBPL.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY
